mapper.sql: id, violation_id, instance_id, appeal_time, remark, site_leader_remark, deal_time, status, annex ,recall_time ,create_by, create_time, modify_by, modify_time
mapper.select: select a.id as id , a.violation_id as violationId, a.instance_id as instanceId, a.appeal_time as appealTime, a.remark, a.deal_time as dealTime, a.status, a.annex , a.recall_time as recallTime, a.create_by as createBy, a.create_time as createTime, a.modify_by as modifyBy, a.modify_time as modifyTime from appeal a left JOIN violation v on a.violation_id = v.id where a.status=11 and v.status = 1 and a.instance_id is null AND DATE_ADD(a.appeal_time,INTERVAL #{timeoutAppeal} DAY) < CURDATE();

select a.id as id , a.violation_id as violationId, a.instance_id as instanceId, a.appeal_time as appealTime, a.remark, a.deal_time as dealTime, a.status, a.annex , a.recall_time as recallTime, a.create_by as createBy, a.create_time as createTime, a.modify_by as modifyBy, a.modify_time as modifyTime from appeal a left JOIN violation v on a.violation_id = v.id where v.status = 1 and a.instance_id is not null and a.status in(11, 15, 17, 19) AND DATE_ADD(a.modify_time,INTERVAL #{timeoutAppeal} DAY) < CURDATE();
